sentences.arabic: لَقَدْ أَحْدَثَتِ القِطاراتُ فائِقَةُ السُّرْعَةِ ثَوْرَةً حَقيقِيَّةً في مَفْهومِ التَّنَقُّلِ بَيْنَ الحَواضِرِ الكُبْرى.
sentences.translation: Brzi vozovi su napravili pravu revoluciju u konceptu kretanja između velikih metropola.
sentences.translationEn: High-speed trains have brought about a true revolution in the concept of mobility between major metropolises.

sentences.arabic: حَيْثُ تَمَّ رَبْطُ الأَقاليمِ المُتَباعِدَةِ بِشَبَكاتٍ حَديثَةٍ تُقَلِّصُ المَسافاتِ الزَّمَنِيَّةَ بِشَكْلٍ مَلْحوظٍ.
sentences.translation: Udaljene regije su povezane modernim mrežama koje značajno smanjuju vremenske udaljenosti.
sentences.translationEn: Distant regions have been linked by modern networks that significantly reduce travel times.

sentences.arabic: إِذا ما قُورِنَتْ هَذِهِ الوَسيلَةُ بِالطَّيَرانِ التَّقْليدِيِّ، فَإِنَّها تَتَمَيَّزُ بِكفاءَةٍ عالِيَةٍ في اسْتِهْلاكِ الطّاقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ako se ovo sredstvo uporedi sa tradicionalnim avijacijom, odlikuje se visokom efikasnošću u potrošnji energije.
sentences.translationEn: If this mode is compared to traditional aviation, it is characterized by high energy efficiency.

sentences.arabic: كَما أَنَّها تُساعِدُ في تَقْليلِ الاِنْبِعاثاتِ الكَرْبونِيَّةِ الضّارَّةِ الَّتي تُؤثِّرُ سَلْباً على المُنَاخِ العَالَمِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Također pomaže u smanjenju štetnih emisija ugljika koje negativno utiču na globalnu klimu.
sentences.translationEn: It also helps in reducing harmful carbon emissions that negatively affect the global climate.

sentences.arabic: لَقَدْ ساهمَ تَطْويرُ مَحَطّاتِ السِّكَكِ الحَديدِيَّةِ في تَحْويلِها إِلى مَراكِزَ تِجارِيَّةً وحَضارِيَّةً مُتَكامِلَةً.
sentences.translation: Razvoj željezničkih stanica doprinio je njihovom pretvaranju u integrisane komercijalne i kulturne centre.
sentences.translationEn: The development of railway stations has contributed to transforming them into integrated commercial and cultural hubs.

sentences.arabic: وهَذا بِدَوْرِهِ أَدَّى إِلى إِنْعاشِ المَناطِقِ المُحيطَةِ بِها وجَذْبِ الاِسْتِثْماراتِ المَحَلِّيَّةِ والضَّخْمَةِ.
sentences.translation: To je zauzvrat dovelo do oživljavanja okolnih područja i privlačenja velikih lokalnih investicija.
sentences.translationEn: This, in turn, has led to the revitalization of surrounding areas and the attraction of massive local investments.

sentences.arabic: مِنْ ناحِيَةٍ أُخْرى، يواجِهُ تَنْفيذُ هَذِهِ المَشاريعِ العِمْلاقَةِ عَقَباتٍ تَمْويلِيَّةً وتِقْنِيَّةً جَسيمَةً.
sentences.translation: S druge strane, implementacija ovih gigantskih projekata suočava se sa ogromnim finansijskim i tehničkim preprekama.
sentences.translationEn: On the other hand, the implementation of these giant projects faces substantial financial and technical obstacles.

sentences.arabic: تَتَطَلَّبُ هَذِهِ التَّحَدِّياتُ تَعاوُناً دَوْلِيّاً وثيقاً وتَخْطيطاً عُمْرانِيّاً دَقيقاً لِتَفادي المَخاطِرِ.
sentences.translation: Ovi izazovi zahtijevaju blisku međunarodnu saradnju i precizno urbanističko planiranje kako bi se izbjegli rizici.
sentences.translationEn: These challenges require close international cooperation and precise urban planning to avoid risks.

sentences.arabic: وبالرَّغْمِ مِنَ التَّكاليفِ الباهِظَةِ لِبِناءِ الخُطوطِ، إِلا أَنَّ العائِدَ الاِجْتِماعيَّ يَبْقى مُرْتَفِعاً جِدّاً.
sentences.translation: Uprkos visokim troškovima izgradnje linija, društveni povrat ostaje veoma visok.
sentences.translationEn: Despite the exorbitant costs of building the lines, the social return remains very high.

sentences.arabic: فَهِيَ تُعَدُّ مَشْروعاً سِيادِيّاً تَتَنافَسُ عَلَيْهِ القُوى العُظْمى لِتَعزيزِ مَكانَتِها الاِقْتِصادِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Oni se smatraju suverenim projektom oko kojeg se takmiče velike sile kako bi ojačale svoj ekonomski status.
sentences.translationEn: They are considered sovereign projects that great powers compete over to enhance their economic standing.

sentences.arabic: صَفْوَةُ القَوْلِ، إِنَّ مُسْتَقْبَلَ المُواصَلاتِ يَرْتَهِنُ بِمَدى قُدْرَتِنا على الاِبْتِكارِ الدّائِمِ.
sentences.translation: Suština je da budućnost transporta zavisi od naše sposobnosti za stalne inovacije.
sentences.translationEn: In short, the future of transportation depends on our capacity for constant innovation.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ نَسْعى لِنَقْلٍ سَريعٍ ومُريحٍ يَحْتَرِمُ المَعاييرَ البيئِيَّةَ الصّارِمَةَ لِضَمانِ الِاسْتِدَامَةِ.
sentences.translation: Moramo težiti brzom i udobnom prevozu koji poštuje stroge ekološke standarde kako bismo osigurali održivost.
sentences.translationEn: We must strive for fast and comfortable transport that respects strict environmental standards to ensure sustainability.
